items.title: Google Summer of Code 2025
items.content:
If you’re a student and want to work on Neovim for GSoC, start here.

  1. If you have a project idea or want to take one of the items listed there, create a new issue (which you can update over the next days/weeks) with a scope/proposal. Aim for “clarity without verbosity”.
  2. Start getting familiar with the codebase by working on one or more complexity:low issues (or any other issue that feels tractable).

Thank you for your interest in Neovim!
